title: ctenitis honesta
intro: Ctenitis honesta is a species of fern native to tropical Asia, characterized by its lance-shaped fronds and rhizome. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Ctenitis honesta are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections. In herbal preparations, Ctenitis honesta is often used in teas, infusions, or as a dried powder to support immune function and overall well-being.
